subcodes.first_line: O Pen! Call to remembrance him who is named Muhammad, son of him who turned towards My Countenance, soared in My atmosphere, migrated with Me, and hearkened unto My call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم اذکر من سمی بمحمد ابن من اقبل الی وجهی و طار فی هوائی و هاجر معی و سمع
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @power of prayer
